TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_tademaw-Maysang_Kalimud(Yang_Chuan_Kuang), title = tademaw-Maysang_Kalimud(Yang_Chuan_Kuang), year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/tademaw-Maysang_Kalimud(Yang_Chuan_Kuang)} }

S.FORM: Maysang Kalimud (Yang Chun Kuang)ś•äŚā≥ŚĽ£ Maysang Kalimud (Yang Chun Kuang)ś•äŚā≥ŚĽ£ u siwkay niza Yang Chun Kuang(1933 mihca 7 bulad 10 demiadÔľć2007 mihca 1 bulad 27 demiad) , ngangan nu Pangcah sa ci Maysang Kalimud. nalecuhan ciniza i Pusung Malan a niyazu'. maala niza ku Roma Kitakit Duba' bataan duba' ingpay (sakatusa a laylay-kawlah). uyniyan sa u sakacacay nu Taywan tu maalaay a duba' kawlah. namaala ku tatuzu' a laylay-kawlah. mangsiw tu Kitakit a nasulitan, sisa singangan tu ciniza u "Yacu Tieren" sananay. namala Kakelidan (Tumukť†≠Áõģ) nu Malan niyuzu'. natayza lipuyin , ku lifaweiyun ciniza. (amicunus henay tu sulit.ŚĺÖŤ£úŚÖÖ) u sapuyaay a kakuniza u kawaw niza u sulit nu Hulam Yang Chuan-kwang, or C.K. Yang (Amis: Maysang Kalimud, Chinese: ś•äŚā≥ŚĽ£; pinyin: Y√°ng Chu√°ngu«éng) (July 10, 1933 ‚Äď January 27, 2007), was an Olympic decathlete from the Republic of China. Yang attended college at UCLA where he trained and competed with team mate and Olympian Rafer Johnson and was coached by Elvin C. Drake. u sulit nu Lipun ś•ä šľĚŚļÉ („āą„ĀÜ . u kawlah niza (amicunus henay tu sulit.ŚĺÖŤ£úŚÖÖ) u uzip niza (amicunus henay tu sulit.ŚĺÖŤ£úŚÖÖ)
S.PHON: majsaŇč kar~…ĺimud (jaŇč ¶ńßun kuaŇč)*** majsaŇč kar~…ĺimud (jaŇč ¶ńßun kuaŇč)*** u siwkaj niza jaŇč ¶ńßun kuaŇč(**** mińß ¶a * bur~…ĺad ** d…ômiad***** mińß ¶a * bur~…ĺad ** d…ômiad) , ŇčaŇčan nu paŇč ¶ańß sa ¶i majsaŇč kar~…ĺimud. nar~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan ¶iniza i pusuŇč mar~…ĺan a nijazu Ē~ °. maar~…ĺa niza ku *oma kitakit duba Ē~ ° bataan duba Ē~ ° iŇčpaj (sakatusa a r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj-kawr~…ĺańß). ujnijan sa u saka ¶a ¶aj nu tajwan tu maar~…ĺaaj a duba Ē~ ° kawr~…ĺańß. namaar~…ĺa ku tatuzu Ē~ ° a r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj-kawr~…ĺańß. maŇčsiw tu kitakit a nasur~…ĺitan, sisa siŇčaŇčan tu ¶iniza u "ja ¶u ti…ôr…ôn" sananaj. namar~…ĺa kak…ôr~…ĺidan (tumuk**) nu mar~…ĺan nijuzu Ē~ °. natajza r~…ĺipujin , ku r~…ĺifaw…ôijun ¶iniza. (ami ¶unus ńß…ônaj tu sur~…ĺit.***) u sapujaaj a kakuniza u kawaw niza u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam jaŇč ¶ńßuan-kwaŇč, or ¶.k. jaŇč (amis: majsaŇč kar~…ĺimud, ¶ńßin…ôs…ô: ***; pinjin: j*Ňč ¶ńßu*Ňču*Ňč) (*ur~…ĺj **, **** * *anuarj **, ****), was an or~…ĺjmpi ¶ d…ô ¶atńßr~…ĺ…ôt…ô from tńß…ô *…ôpubr~…ĺi ¶ of ¶ńßina. jaŇč att…ônd…ôd ¶or~…ĺr~…ĺ…ôg…ô at u ¶r~…ĺa wńß…ôr…ô ńß…ô train…ôd and ¶omp…ôt…ôd witńß t…ôam mat…ô and or~…ĺjmpian *af…ôr *ońßnson and was ¶oa ¶ńß…ôd bj …ôr~…ĺ*in ¶. drak…ô. u sur~…ĺit nu r~…ĺipun * ** (** . u kawr~…ĺańß niza (ami ¶unus ńß…ônaj tu sur~…ĺit.***) u uzip niza (ami ¶unus ńß…ônaj tu sur~…ĺit.***)
S.FORM: Maysang Kalimud (Yang Chun Kuang)ś•äŚā≥ŚĽ£ Maysang Kalimud (Yang Chun Kuang)ś•äŚā≥ŚĽ£ u siwkay niza Yang Chun Kuang(1933 mihca 7 bulad 10 demiadÔľć2007 mihca 1 bulad 27 demiad) , ngangan nu Pangcah sa ci Maysang Kalimud. nalecuhan ciniza i Pusung Malan a niyazu'. maala niza ku Roma Kitakit Duba' bataan duba' ingpay (sakatusa a laylay-kawlah). uyniyan sa u sakacacay nu Taywan tu maalaay a duba' kawlah. namaala ku tatuzu' a laylay-kawlah. mangsiw tu Kitakit a nasulitan, sisa singangan tu ciniza u "Yacu Tieren" sananay. namala Kakelidan (Tumukť†≠Áõģ) nu Malan niyuzu'. natayza lipuyin , ku lifaweiyun ciniza. (amicunus henay tu sulit.ŚĺÖŤ£úŚÖÖ) u sapuyaay a kakuniza u kawaw niza u sulit nu Hulam Yang Chuan-kwang, or C.K. Yang attended college at UCLA where he trained and competed with team mate and Olympian Rafer Johnson and was coached by Elvin C.
